heading: Prerequisites
body:
Before you begin, complete the following steps:

- Complete the [MongoDB Get Started](get-started) guide to set
  up a new Atlas account and load sample data into a new
  free tier MongoDB deployment.

- Get the [connection string](manual/reference/connection-string) for your cluster and save it to use
  later in this tutorial.

- Create a Vercel account by visiting the [Vercel website](https://vercel.com/).

- [Download Node.js](https://nodejs.org/en/download) version 18 or later.

- Ensure you have [npm and npx installed](https://docs.npmjs.com/downloading-and-installing-node-js-and-npm).
